findings.evidence: /tmp/evidence.txt returned NOT_EVALUATED / missing evidence instead of INVALID / unsafe evidence path.
findings.impact: Status mapping diverges from V1.1 for an explicitly reviewed unsafe-path class. The path did not become PROCEED, but acceptance requires exact mapping.
findings.required_fix: Reject root-relative/POSIX-style absolute paths as unsafe before evidence existence checks.
findings.title: POSIX-style absolute evidence paths are not classified as unsafe paths on Windows

findings.evidence: C:tmp/evidence.txt returned NOT_EVALUATED / missing evidence instead of INVALID / unsafe evidence path.
findings.impact: Windows drive-relative syntax can bypass the intended unsafe-path classification. It did not fail open, but mapping fidelity is not accepted.
findings.required_fix: Reject drive-qualified or drive-relative strings before path resolution.
findings.title: Drive-relative evidence paths are not classified as unsafe paths

findings.evidence: A directory in evidence_manifest triggered TOOL_ERROR with a local temp path in tool_errors/details.
findings.impact: A deterministic validation failure is masked as an internal tool defect and leaks a local path in the machine result.
findings.required_fix: Classify directories before read_bytes, return deterministic validation status, and avoid local path disclosure.
findings.title: Directory evidence paths become TOOL_ERROR with local path disclosure

findings.evidence: Two identical evidence_manifest entries for evidence_a.txt returned VALID.
findings.impact: The acceptance review explicitly requires duplicate evidence path review. Duplicate evidence identity should not pass as a clean structural/evidence result.
findings.required_fix: Reject duplicate evidence paths or duplicate evidence identities deterministically.
findings.title: Duplicate evidence paths are accepted as VALID

findings.evidence: All reviewed failures preserved recommended_agent_action != PROCEED and stop == true.
findings.impact: The current blockers are mapping/integrity issues, not a PROCEED fail-open.
findings.title: Phase 1 preserves fail-closed action invariants for reviewed failures

path_security_results.note: No URL decoding is implemented; treated as literal missing filename.
